metodos.codigoOriginal:
Lparameters lpCond

Private pPag

pPag = Padr(lpCond, 12)

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr.Requery('crSigCnFBl')

	Select crSigCnFBl
	Go Top

	If Eof('crSigCnFBl')
		.getTxtCds.Enabled = .f.
		.getLocals.Enabled = .f.
		.lblAviso.Visible  = .t.
		.cmdGImprimir.cmdImprimir.Enabled = .f.
		.cmdGImprimir.Value = 2
	Else
		.getTxtCds.Enabled = .t.
		.getLocals.Enabled = .t.
		.lblAviso.Visible  = .f.
		.getTxtCds.Value   = crSigCnFBl.cTxtCds
		.cmdGImprimir.cmdImprimir.Enabled = .t.
	EndIf

	.getTxtCds.Re... [TRUNCADO]

Lparameters lnLinha, lnColuna, lcDetalhe, lcEstilo, lclinesize, lcheight

lnLinha   = Iif(Type('lnLinha')  =='N', lnLinha,  0)
lnColuna  = Iif(Type('lnColuna') =='N', lnColuna, 0)
lcDetalhe = Iif(Type('lcDetalhe')=='C', lcDetalhe,'')
lcEstilo  = Iif(Type('lcEstilo') =='C', lcEstilo, 'X')

If (Not m.lcEstilo=='*' And (lnColuna<>0 Or lnLinha<>0))
	Insert Into TmpImprime (Linha, Coluna, Conteudo, Style, LineSize, NHeight) ;
  		   			Values (lnLinha, lnColuna, lcDetalhe, Alltrim(lcEstilo), lcLineSi... [TRUNCADO]

Lparameters lcChave1, lcNform1

ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption

Private pPag

pPag = Space(12)

lcQueryCfgBl  = [Select * From SigCnFBl Where FPags = ?pPag]

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', .Name)
	With .poDataMgr
		.AddCursor('SigCnFBl', 'cIdChaves', 'crSigCnFBl', '', '',lcQueryCfgBl)
	EndWith

	.pcChave1 = lcChave1
	.pcNform1 = lcNform1

	=DoDefault()

	.AtualizaBoleto([]) 

	If Not Used('... [TRUNCADO]

Local lcEscape,lcTalk,lnDecimals,lcFixed,llArea1,llArea2,llArea3,llArea4,llArea5,llArea6,llArea7,lnConta1,lnConta2,lnMemo,lnLnTxt,cLdetalhes,cEstilos,nLinhas,nColunas,;
      lnQtLinha,cTxtCds,laPrinters,llTemImp,lnConta1,lnNffatorln,lnNffatorcl,lnTamFolha1

m.lnNffatorln = 0
m.lnNffatorcl = 0
ThisForm.LockScreen = .t.

If MessageBox('Confirma a Impressăo do(s) Boleto(s) Bancário(s)?',32+4,[Confirmaçăo])==6

	Create Cursor Crdados(clocal c(100),vencs c(12),datdoc d,numdoc c(8),valor n(14,2),raza... [TRUNCADO]

If (Not ThisForm.cmdGImprimir.cmdImprimir.Enabled) Or ;
	   (Thisform.cmdGImprimir.cmdImprimir.Enabled And ;
	    Messagebox('Deseja Abandonar as Impressőes do Boleto?', 4+32+256, [Confirmaçăo])==6)

	If Type('ThisForm.pcNform1')=='O'
		If Type('ThisForm.pcNform1')=='O'
			ThisForm.pcNform1.Enabled = .t.
		Else
			ThisForm.pcNform1.Enabled = .t.
		EndIf
	EndIf
	ThisForm.poDataMgr.Release
	ThisForm.Release
EndIf
* Fim *******************************************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCnFBl', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'FPags', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('FPags', '', 'Condiçăo')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Value = Iif(Lastkey()=27, '', crListaRemota.FPags)
	Use In crListaRemota
EndIf
This.Refresh

ThisForm.AtualizaBoleto(This.Value)
* Fim **********************************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Insert Into TmpImprime (Linha, Coluna, Conteudo, Style, LineSize, NHeight) ; 		   			Values (lnLinha, lnColuna, lcDetalhe, Alltrim(lcEstilo), lcLineSi... [TRUNCADO]
